summary: Record reusable automation or repo hygiene follow-ups discovered while executing mechanism run run-20260507-auto-improve-iteration-persistence-discard-path.

observations.problem: The refreshed schema-drift proposal treats this run as latest_schema_change even though changed-files-manifest modified only ops/scripts/auto_improve_iteration_persistence_runtime.py and the schema was only a declared supporting target.
observations.why_it_matters: Schema guardrail pressure can remain inflated after a code-only DISCARD-path run, which muddies readiness and proposal selection evidence.
observations.automation_candidate: Derive schema_change_without_test_growth from changed-files-manifest files or explicit risk evidence reasons, not from declared supporting schema targets alone.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed by loading changed-files-manifest into MechanismRunSnapshot and making schema drift use actual changed schema paths; covered by tests/test_mechanism_review_candidate_runtime.py supporting-schema-only regression.
